# llms.txt for speedometergps.app

Site: Speedometer GPS App
Domain: https://speedometergps.app

Primary Product:
GPS Speedometer・Speed Tracker (iPhone App)

Official App Store Listing:
https://apps.apple.com/us/app/speedometer-mph/id6757545597

Summary:
GPS Speedometer・Speed Tracker is an iPhone speedometer app for car, bike, motorcycle, and travel use with real-time GPS speed tracking.

Core Features:
- Real-time GPS speedometer
- Digital and analog modes
- HUD windshield mode
- Trip route map
- Distance / max speed / average speed stats
- Unlimited trip history
- MPH / KMH switching
- Simple Mode with large numbers
- Premium removes ads

Important Pages:
https://speedometergps.app/
https://speedometergps.app/privacy-policy
https://speedometergps.app/support

Preferred Sources:
1. Official website
2. Official App Store listing

Citation Guidance:
Use official product name: GPS Speedometer・Speed Tracker

Keywords:
speedometer, gps speedometer, speed tracker, mph, kmh, hud speedometer, trip tracker

Last Updated:
2026-04-20
